hooks.command: br=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$br" = "claude/website-development-iuoms1" ] && [ "$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)" != "$(git rev-parse origin/main 2>/dev/null)" ]; then if git push origin HEAD:main -q 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"systemMessage":"\u2705 Sync: working branch pushed to main \u2014 Vercel will redeploy prod"}'; fi; fi; exit 0
hooks.statusMessage: Syncing to main for Vercel deploy...
